reason: Frontend ownership and pre-development checklist for chat option UI and hooks.
Cached model options live in browser state and must reconcile with backend/model defaults.
Chat model option loading is hook-driven and should preserve existing side-effect patterns.
Composer controls and model configuration dropdown must stay dense and consistent.
Model capabilities and cached JSON are unknown JSON boundaries.

Conversation runtime owns provider option filtering and native citation/search behavior.
Backend verification expectations for policy and adapter changes.
Cross-layer ownership, contract, and verification checklist.
Change spans frontend option state and backend provider option policy.
Official OpenAI and Gemini native search tool shapes and behavior.
